perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a live-action shot of a crowded Costco warehouse interior, showing people with shopping carts near the entrance/exit. (2) A series of rapid cuts follow, showcasing various consumer products stacked on pallets or shelves: purple tissue boxes, jars of mixed nuts, boxes of cream puffs, pink snack boxes, sliced meats in a refrigerated display, and various bags of chips and snacks. (3) Further cuts show stacks of canned drinks, boxes of oat milk, gummy candies, crackers, frozen shrimp patties, hand soap, and chocolate bars. (4) The sequence continues with boxes of apples, butterfly pastries, kombucha, lemon green tea, chicken breast, bread, and noodles. (5) The final segments display coffee, soda cans, instant noodles, sauces, tea, wine, and beer cases.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music with a fast tempo starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male voice speaks enthusiastically and rapidly, announcing product names and specific discount prices in Mandarin, synchronized with each visual cut. (3) Faint ambient warehouse noise is heard in the background, including the low hum of a large space and muffled sounds of movement, though mostly masked by the music and narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'COSTCO 比角便宜超人 好市多 每週特價速報 07/28 - 08/03 記得追蹤我們' (Costco Super Cheap Hero, Costco Weekly Special Report, 07/28-08/03, Remember to follow us) in a bold, variety-show style. (2) Functional text appears for each item, such as '舒潔 三層抽取式衛生紙 原價419 -84 特價335' (Kleenex 3-ply toilet paper, Original 419 -84 Special 335), '科克蘭綜合堅果 原價559 -60 特價499' (Kirkland Mixed Nuts), and so on for approximately 40 different products. (3) All text is in Traditional Chinese and uses a consistent layout to emphasize the savings amount and final price.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire list of product deals -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Intro shows a large group of shoppers in the warehouse; several hands are visible touching products during the montage.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large Costco warehouse with high ceilings, industrial shelving, wooden pallets, and refrigerated sections.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional shopping guide for Costco members, aiming to provide a quick and energetic overview of the current week's discount items (07/28 - 08/03) to drive store visits and sales.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly lists Costco brand products (Kirkland) and other items available at Costco with their specific prices and discounts.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy voiceover, fast-paced 'speed-run' style product listing, consistent price overlay template.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video is optimized for social media (TikTok/Reels) with its vertical format, fast cuts, and immediate focus on value/discounts.
